mapper.sql: id, nickname, `password`, mobile, avatar, `status`, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into t_user (id, nickname, `password`, mobile, avatar, `status`, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_user
id,
nickname,
`password`,
mobile,
avatar,
`status`,
create_time,
update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_user
nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_user set nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
